name: The Naganobank, Ltd.
summary: The Naganobank, Ltd. provides banking products and services to individual and corporate customers in Japan. The company offers current accounts and fund management products, as well as ordinary, settlement, notification, and tax reserve deposits. It also provides business and card, ISO, SME, agricultural support, medical, and other loans; private placement bonds; overdraft root guarantees; credit card related services; and leasing, overseas business support, contribution pension, power consortium, business matching, and collection services. In addition, the company offers corporate life insurance, farm banking, night safe, and financial EDI services. It operates 52 prefecture stores, including 1 branch office; and 1 store in Tokyo, as well as 56 outside store ATMs. The Naganobank, Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Matsumoto, Japan.
